description_long: This house is a sprawling, single-story residential structure with a modern, open-plan layout and multiple interconnected rooms. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The interior features a mix of dark wood and light-colored flooring, with several rooms clearly demarcated, including what appear to be bedrooms, bathrooms, and communal living spaces. The central section of the house is more prominent, possibly serving as the main living or gathering area, and is flanked by symmetrical wings. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the overall footprint is wide and low. Entryways are visible at the front, with steps leading up to the main doors, and the house is designed to be both functional and visually appealing in an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, modern single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, and expansive, open-plan interior spaces. The structure features symmetrical wings, large windows, and a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical layout, central entryway, and multiple rooms extending outward on both sides.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the house, the flat roof, and the arrangement of interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, large windows, and the overall width of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the open-plan layout and the connection between the central and side sections.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, large door, and minimal overhang, emphasizing clean lines and modern simplicity.
